title: The Race to Alubarna Begins
main_description: The rebellion and royal army rush toward Alubarna as Vivi’s group searches for a way to stop the war before it starts. The chapter has been revised into display-ready parts with Alabasta-arc character context, cleaned dialogue, and corrected scene framing.
key_events: Vivi Tries to Stop the War
The Crew Searches for the True Enemy
